name: Aric
speech_patterns: Constantly compares current game to 'how it used to be'
Complains about modern conveniences making game too easy
Shares stories from early game days
quirks: Refuses to use fast travel, walks everywhere 'like we used to'
Starts every dungeon with 'back in my day we didn't have...'
example_phrases: back in my day you had to FIND the dungeon entrance yourself. no quest markers, no hand-holding
remember when dying actually mattered? now everyone just respawns and keeps going like nothing happened
kids these days don't know how good they have it. we used to wipe 20 times learning one boss
this 'quality of life' stuff is making everyone soft. struggle builds character
i've been tanking since level 1, before half you were even created. trust me, i know the old ways
